zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Scobell於1408年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特福洛時，她的父親Robert Scobhill27歲，母親Elinor24歲。她於1432年與Robert Kirkham在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1449年12月4日在英國薩默塞特福洛享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Scobell于1408年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特福洛时，她的父亲Robert Scobhill27岁，母亲Elinor24岁。她于1432年与Robert Kirkham在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1449年12月4日在英国薩默塞特福洛享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Scobell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Scoble
meanings: English (Devon and Cornwall): habitational name from Scoble in South Pool (Devon), from an Old English personal name Sc(e)obba + Old English hyll ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Scobell was born in 1408, in Frome, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Scobhill, was 27 and her mother, Elinor, was 24. She married Robert Kirkham in 1432, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 4 December 1449, in Frome, Somerset, England, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Scobell est née en 1408, à Frome, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Scobhill, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elinor, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Kirkham en 1432, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 4 décembre 1449, à Frome, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Scobell 1408 in Frome, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Scobhill 27 und ihre Mutter Elinor 24. Sie hat 1432 in Devon, England, United Kingdom Robert Kirkham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 4. Dezember 1449 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Frome, Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Scobell è nata il nel 1408 nel Frome, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Scobhill, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Elinor, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Robert Kirkham nel 1432, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 4 dicembre 1449, nel Frome, Somerset, England, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Scobellが1408年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトフロメで生まれた時，父Robert Scobhillは27歳，母Elinorは24歳であった。1432年にイギリスイギリスデボンでRobert Kirkhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1449年12月4日にイギリスソメルセトフロメで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Scobell(이)가 1408년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 프롬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Scobhill(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elinor(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1432년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Robert Kirkham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1449년 12월 4일 영국 서머세트 프롬에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Scobell nasceu em 1408, em Frome, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Scobhill, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elinor, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Kirkham em 1432, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 4 de dezembro de 1449, em Frome, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Scobell родилась в 1408 г. в местности фром, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Scobhill было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elinor, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Kirkham в 1432 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 4 декабря 1449 г. в местности фром, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Scobell nació en 1408, en Frome, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Scobhill, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elinor, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Robert Kirkham en 1432, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 4 de diciembre de 1449, en Frome, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años.
